summary: High‑quality soundboard recording of a Brent‑era show, highlighted by an ecstatic Dark Star, though a ~10 minute Drums/Space segment is missing.
review: Fans rave about the crystal‑clear soundboard source and describe the performance as one of the best Brent‑and‑Jerry shows, with Dark Star eliciting a frenzied crowd reaction. The recording is praised as “best sounding,” but it is unfortunately missing a ten‑minute Drums/Space excerpt, which detracts slightly from an otherwise superb document.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical praise (70% weight) combined with a very good but incomplete soundboard recording (30% weight) yields an overall rating around 4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised as the best‑sounding source by multiple reviewers, but a ~10 minute Drums/Space section is missing, limiting completeness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic crowd response and strong interplay between Brent and Jerry; overall flow described as memorable despite the missing drum/space portion.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised; reviewers note his playing as a highlight of the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboards are highlighted as part of one of the best Brent‑and‑Jerry shows.
band_member_comments.Drums: No specific performance comment, but a missing Drums/Space segment is noted.
